CustomField.formula: Amniocyte_PBIO_AC100_Asset_Amount__c + Corecyte_1ml_PBIO_CC100_Asset_Amount__c + Corecyte_2ml_PBIO_CC200_Asset_Amount__c + Fun_Vibrator_Asset_Amount__c + Juvederm_Ultra_3_Asset_Amount__c + Kaplan_Penis_Pump_Asset_Amount__c + Kaplan_Penis_Pump_Base_Asset_Amount__c + KY_Jelly_Asset_Amount__c + Nutrafol_Men_Asset_Amount__c + Nutrafol_Women_Asset_Amount__c + Phallosan_Penis_Stretcher_Asset_Amount__c + PRP_Kit_30_Eclipse_Asset_Amount__c + PRP_Kit_30_Harvest_Asset_Amount__c + PRP_Kit_60_Emcyte_Asset_Amount__c + PRP_Kit_60_Harvest_Asset_Amount__c + UBER_Lube_Asset_Amount__c + Verapamil_5MG_Asset_Amount__c
CustomField.label: Total Assets Amount
